title: Clamp pagination boundaries
prompt: Fix paginate so page numbers below 1 return the first page and page numbers beyond the end return an empty list. Preserve the public function signature.
hidden_tests_description: Page zero, negative page numbers, beyond-end pages, and zero per_page are checked.
public_api_contract: paginate(items: list, page: int, per_page: int) -> list
h0_risk_notes: A disciplined baseline should be competitive on this boundary task.
